headline: Owner, Anatolia Kebab House LLC — halal Turkish grill, Paterson & Wayne NJ
summary: Owner and operator of Anatolia Kebab House LLC — two halal Turkish restaurants in Paterson (2012) and Wayne (2021), New Jersey, plus a mixed-use property on Van Houten Street in Paterson. Born and raised in Gaziantep, Turkey. Twenty-two employees combined. Catering across Turkish-American community weddings, corporate lunches, mosque partnerships. Direct communicator; quality-obsessed on halal meat sourcing and hand-ground Adana spice blend.
